CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Strawberry Shortcake
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: 🍓 Strawberry Shortcake (5.5”) A light and elegant strawberry shortcake made with layers of soft vanilla sponge cake, fresh sliced strawberries, silky vanilla cream, and a homemade strawberry topping. Perfect for birthdays, small celebrations, date nights, or a sweet treat to share. ✔ Fresh strawberries ✔ Homemade vanilla cream ✔ Made to order ✔ Custom message included Serves 4–6 people.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Carrot Cake – Slice
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Moist, warmly spiced carrot sponge (cinnamon + nutmeg) layered with our cream-cheese European-style pastry cream, creating a velvety, lighter twist on traditional carrot cake frosting. Balanced sweetness, rich flavor, and baked fresh daily.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Classic Vanilla Cake– Slice
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Soft vanilla sponge layered with our signature European-style vanilla pastry cream, creating an ultra-smooth and delicate flavor. Light, silky, and baked fresh in-house daily.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Red Velvet Cake – Slice
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Classic red velvet cake layered with our cream-cheese–infused European-style pastry cream, which creates a lighter, silkier, and more luxurious version of traditional cream cheese frosting. Soft cocoa notes and velvety texture make this a customer favorite.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Strawberry Shortcake – Slice
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Light vanilla sponge layered with fresh strawberries and our signature European-style whipped pastry cream, creating a silky, refreshing, fruit-forward dessert. Perfect balance of creaminess and natural strawberry sweetness.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Mozaik Cake – Slice
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Traditional Turkish-style chocolate mosaic cake made with buttery biscuit pieces, rich cocoa, and a smooth chocolate base. Finished with a touch of our signature European-style chocolate pastry cream for a velvety, premium texture. Served chilled

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Trilece – Slice
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Ultra-soft airy sponge soaked in a three-milk blend and topped with our signature European-style whipped pastry cream, then finished with a silky caramel glaze. Moist, light, creamy, and one of our bestselling traditional European desserts — made fresh in-house.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Biscoff Lotus Cake – Whole (8")
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Vanilla sponge layered with European-style Biscoff pastry cream, topped with Lotus crumble and drizzle. Our whole cakes are made fresh to order. Please allow preparation time. Same-day availability may vary.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Carrot Cake – Whole (8")
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Warmly spiced carrot sponge layered with European-style cream-cheese pastry cream, smooth and balanced. Our whole cakes are made fresh to order. Please allow preparation time. Same-day availability may vary.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Classic Vanilla Cake – Whole (8")
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Soft vanilla sponge layered with our signature European-style vanilla pastry cream, finished with a silky smooth frosting. Our whole cakes are made fresh to order. Please allow preparation time. Same-day availability may vary.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Chocolate Fudge Cake – Whole (8")
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Moist chocolate sponge filled with European-style chocolate pastry cream, giving it a velvety, mousse-like texture. Our whole cakes are made fresh to order. Please allow preparation time. Same-day availability may vary.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Mozaik Cake – Whole
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Traditional Turkish-style chocolate mosaic cake made with buttery biscuit pieces and rich cocoa, blended with our signature European-style chocolate pastry cream for an ultra-smooth, premium finish. Shaped into a whole loaf and served chilled. Our whole cakes are made fresh to order. Please allow preparation time. Same-day availability may vary

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Red Velvet Cake – Whole (8")
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Classic red velvet sponge layered with cream-cheese–infused European-style pastry cream, lighter and smoother than traditional frosting. Our whole cakes are made fresh to order. Please allow preparation time. Same-day availability may vary.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Strawberry Shortcake – Whole (8")
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Light vanilla sponge layered with fresh strawberries and European-style whipped pastry cream. Our whole cakes are made fresh to order. Please allow preparation time. Same-day availability may vary.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Trilece – Whole
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Soft milk-soaked sponge topped with caramel glaze and European-style whipped pastry cream. Our whole cakes are made fresh to order. Please allow preparation time. Same-day availability may vary.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Fraise Noire
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Inspired by the elegance of Parisian patisseries, Fraise Noire is a delicate cocoa velvet cake topped with hand-whipped white chocolate cream and glazed fresh strawberries. Crafted in small batches, this dessert captures the charm of a quiet morning in Montmartre — where every bite feels like a soft-spoken secret. Refined, romantic, and unapologetically French La douceur parisienne, chez D’ERA.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Cinnamon Roll (Cream Cheese Frosting)
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Fluffy cinnamon roll baked with brown sugar cinnamon filling and finished with house-made cream cheese frosting.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Ham & Swiss Croissant
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Premium sliced ham and melted Swiss cheese tucked into a buttery croissant. Warm, filling, and perfect for breakfast.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Spinach & Feta Puff
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Crispy golden puff pastry filled with spinach, feta, herbs, and seasoning. Savory, filling, and vegetarian-friendly.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Banana Bread
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Banana bread with moist banana slices and subtle hints of vanilla, topped with crushed walnuts.

CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).name: Butter Croissant
CAKES (SLICE & WHOLE).desc: Flaky, buttery French croissant baked fresh daily.

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: Chocolate Croissant (Pain Au Chocolat)
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Classic French pain au chocolat baked golden, wrapped around premium dark chocolate batons that melt into soft layers.

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: Cheese Danish
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Golden Danish pastry filled with smooth, lightly sweetened cream cheese. Buttery, creamy, and perfectly balanced

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: Almond Croissant
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Buttery laminated croissant filled with rich house-made almond frangipane and finished with golden toasted almonds. Slightly sweet and aromatic.

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: Profiteroles
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Cream puff decorated with rich chocolate sauce

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: Chocolate Éclair (2)
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Light and airy choux pastry filled with our signature European-style pastry cream and topped with silky chocolate glaze. A classic, elegant dessert.

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: Fruit Tart (5)
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Five fresh fruit tarts topped with a colorful mix of kiwi, strawberry, raspberry, blackberry, and banana. A perfect sweet treat to share or enjoy all to yourself.

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: Chocolate Covered Strawberries (5)
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Fresh strawberries dipped in rich chocolate, offering a delightful balance of sweetness and indulgence. (5 pieces)

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: Dubai Chocolate
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Rich, creamy chocolate bars crafted with premium ingredients, offering a smooth and decadent treat.

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: New York Cheesecake – Whole (8″)
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Creamy whole cheesecake blended with our signature European-style whipped pastry cream for a silky, luxurious texture. Our whole cakes are made fresh to order. Please allow preparation time. Same-day availability may vary

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: Strawberry Cheesecake – Whole (8″)
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Creamy cheesecake topped with house-made strawberry sauce and blended with European-style whipped pastry cream. Our whole cakes are made fresh to order. Please allow preparation time. Same-day availability may vary.

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: Oreo Cheesecake – Whole (8″)
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Silky Oreo cheesecake blended with our European-style whipped Oreo pastry cream and topped with crushed Oreos. Our whole cakes are made fresh to order. Please allow preparation time. Same-day availability may vary.

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: New York Cheesecake-Slice
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Creamy New York–style cheesecake blended with our signature European-style whipped pastry cream for a silky, smooth finish. Light vanilla aroma, rich texture, baked fresh in-house.

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: Strawberry Cheesecake – Slice
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Silky cheesecake topped with house-made strawberry sauce and finished with a touch of European-style whipped pastry cream. Creamy, fruity, and perfectly balanced.

BREAKFAST PASTRIES.name: M&M Cheesecake – Whole ( 8″)
BREAKFAST PASTRIES.desc: Creamy vanilla cheesecake mixed with crunchy chocolate M&Ms and topped with European-style whipped vanilla pastry cream. Our whole cakes are made fresh to order. Please allow preparation time. Same-day availability may vary.

SIGNATURE DESSERT CUPS & MINI TREATS.name: Banana Pudding
SIGNATURE DESSERT CUPS & MINI TREATS.desc: A rich, dreamy banana pudding made the NYC way – layered with fresh banana slices, fluffy vanilla pudding, and crispy vanilla wafers. Handcrafted in small batches. Served chilled. Limited daily quantity – always fresh!

SIGNATURE DESSERT CUPS & MINI TREATS.name: Brownie
SIGNATURE DESSERT CUPS & MINI TREATS.desc: Rich chocolate square with a fudgy interior and a slightly crisp top.

CHEESECAKES.name: Oreo Cheesecake – Slice
CHEESECAKES.desc: Classic cheesecake blended with crushed Oreos and our signature European-style whipped Oreo pastry cream, creating a silky cookies-and-cream texture. Finished with Oreo crumble on top.

CHEESECAKES.name: M&M Cheesecake – Slice
CHEESECAKES.desc: Creamy vanilla cheesecake swirled with chocolate M&Ms and topped with our signature European-style vanilla pastry cream, adding a smooth finish to the crunchy-chocolate texture. Fun, colorful, and kid-friendly.

BEVERAGES.name: Turkish Coffee
BEVERAGES.desc: Strong coffee with a thick layer of ground coffee at the bottom, served in a small cup.

BEVERAGES.name: Hot Chocolate
BEVERAGES.desc: Rich chocolate drink with steamed milk, topped with whipped cream and a sprinkle of cocoa powder.

BEVERAGES.name: Cafe Latte
BEVERAGES.desc: Rich espresso blended with steamed milk, topped with a layer of frothy foam.

BEVERAGES.name: Americano
BEVERAGES.desc: Bold espresso blended with hot water for a smooth, balanced coffee experience.

BEVERAGES.name: Nutella Swirl Cupcake
BEVERAGES.desc: Chocolate-hazelnut cupcake swirled with Nutella and topped with our Nutella-infused European-style pastry cream, creating the smoothest, richest Nutella frosting possible. A bestseller.

BEVERAGES.name: Vanilla Bean Cupcake
BEVERAGES.desc: Soft vanilla sponge topped with our signature European-style vanilla pastry cream, whipped into a silky buttercream-like texture. Light, elegant, and aromatic, a classic elevated to a luxury level.

BEVERAGES.name: Cookie Box (8-pack)
BEVERAGES.desc: An assortment of eight cookies featuring chocolate chip

BEVERAGES.name: Office Celebration Cake – Corporate Friendly
BEVERAGES.desc: Starting at $55. Pricing varies based on design, size, and theme. Office celebration cakes are available for in-store or phone ordering only. A clean, elegant cake ideal for office events, retirements, promotions, team celebrations, or corporate gatherings. Designs can be kept simple and classic or customized to match company colors.

BEVERAGES.name: Anniversary Cake – Classic Elegance
BEVERAGES.desc: A smooth, elegant cake perfect for celebrating love and special milestones. Available in any of our flavors and customizable with soft floral details, gold/silver accents (optional), or a minimalist modern finish. Custom designs and color themes available upon request. In-store or phone ordering only. Starting at $55. Price varies based on size, flavor, and design.

BEVERAGES.name: Engagement Cake – Floral or Minimalist
BEVERAGES.desc: Starting at $55. Pricing varies based on size, flavor, and design. All custom engagement cakes are available for in-store or phone ordering only. A romantic engagement cake designed with soft florals, pastel tones, or a minimalist smooth finish. Available in any of our signature flavors and customizable with initials, color themes, light piping, or classic white elegance. Perfect for intimate celebrations or upscale engagement dinners.

BEVERAGES.name: Baby Shower Cake – Boy / Girl Theme
BEVERAGES.desc: Starting at $55. Pricing varies based on size, flavor, and decoration. Custom baby shower cakes are available for in-store or phone ordering only. A sweet and elegant baby shower cake available in pink, blue, beige, cream, or any neutral color palette. Choose from soft cloud-style piping, simple fondant accents, or modern minimalist designs. Perfect for celebrating the arrival of your little one.

CUPCAKES.name: Red Velvet Cupcake
CUPCAKES.desc: Moist red velvet cake topped with a cream-cheese–infused European-style pastry cream, creating a lighter, silkier version of classic cream cheese frosting. Smooth, elegant, and perfectly balanced.

CUPCAKES.name: Carrot Cake Cupcake
CUPCAKES.desc: Spiced carrot sponge topped with our cream-cheese European-style pastry cream, giving a velvety, lighter twist to traditional carrot cake frosting. Warm spices and creamy finish

COOKIES.name: White Chocolate Cookie
COOKIES.desc: Soft cookie with chunks of sweet white chocolate.

SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.name: Gender Reveal Cake – Surprise Center
SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.desc: Starting at $55. Pricing varies based on theme and filling design. Gender reveal cakes are available for in-store or phone ordering only. A classic gender reveal cake with a simple, neutral outer design and optional pink or blue surprise center. Flavors, colors, and decorative accents can be fully customized. Ideal for family gatherings or gender reveal parties.

SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.name: Graduation Cake – School Colors Available
SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.desc: Starting at $55. Pricing varies based on size, color theme, and decoration. Graduation cakes are available for in-store or phone ordering only. A celebratory graduation cake customizable with school colors, graduation year, and simple toppers. Available in any flavor. Perfect for class parties, ceremonies, and family celebrations.

SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.name: Pistachio Baklava (4 pcs)
SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.desc: Layered pastry with finely chopped pistachios and sweet syrup, served as four pieces

SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.name: Walnut Baklava (4 pcs)
SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.desc: Layers of phyllo dough, honey, and walnuts. Four pieces per serving.

SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.name: Wedding Cake – Two Tier
SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.desc: Starting at $160. Price varies based on tier size, flavor selection, and design. Two-tier wedding cakes are available for in-store or phone consultation only. An elegant two-tier cake crafted with premium layers and our signature pastry cream. Customize with soft florals, pearls, smooth edges, or modern pastel tones.

SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.name: Custom Gift Sets
SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.desc: Beautifully curated gift sets customized for any occasion birthdays, anniversaries, baby showers, graduations, thank-you gifts, holidays, corporate events, and more. Each box is fully adjustable: choose your preferred treats, colors, themes, and size. Perfect for last-minute gifting. Customization and pricing vary by selection.

SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.name: Strawberry shortcake
SPECIAL DAY ORDERS.desc: 🍓 Strawberry Shortcake (5.5”) A light and elegant strawberry shortcake made with layers of soft vanilla sponge cake, fresh sliced strawberries, silky vanilla cream

BAKLAVA.name: Cold Pistachio Baklava (Soğuk Baklava) (4pcs)
BAKLAVA.desc: Chilled pistachio baklava topped with light chocolate dusting and cold milk syrup.

BAKLAVA.name: Carrot Slice Baklava (Havuç Dilim)
BAKLAVA.desc: Premium pistachio-filled baklava prepared in the traditional “carrot slice” style. Ultra-thin phyllo layers, clarified butter, and a rich pistachio center create a crisp, delicate, and elegant dessert. A classic specialty for baklava lovers.

DEALS.name: Bagel w Cream Cheese + Large Coffee

WEDDING ORDERS.name: Wedding Cake – Three Tier
WEDDING ORDERS.desc: Starting at $250. Price varies based on size, theme, and decoration complexity. Three-tier wedding cakes require in-store or phone consultation only. A luxurious three-tier centerpiece cake designed for weddings and large celebrations. Smooth finish, floral accents, or modern clean-layer design available upon request.

WEDDING ORDERS.name: Wedding Cake – Single Tier (6″ / 8″)
WEDDING ORDERS.desc: Starting at $85. Price varies based on size, flavor, and decoration. Wedding cake orders are available for in-store or phone consultation only. A beautifully smooth single-tier wedding cake perfect for intimate ceremonies, elopements, and small celebrations. Customizable with florals, piping, minimalist white finish, or pastel themes.

CUSTOM ORDERS.name: Fresh Fruit Basket / Fruit Platter
CUSTOM ORDERS.desc: Beautifully arranged seasonal fruits. Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, parties, and corporate events. Designs vary by season. Customization available in-store or by phone.

CUSTOM ORDERS.name: Stuffed Dates/ Filled Dates
CUSTOM ORDERS.desc: Fresh premium dates filled to your choice. Fully customizable flavors, fillings, toppings and quantities can be adjusted. If you have any special requests or large orders, please call the store or visit the store.

SEASONAL SPECIALS.name: Pumpkin Pie – Whole (9")
SEASONAL SPECIALS.desc: A smooth and creamy pumpkin pie baked with warm fall spices and a silky custard filling. Available in 9-inch (serves 6–8) and 12-inch (serves 10–14) sizes. Perfect for Thanksgiving tables, holiday dinners, or family gatherings. Seasonal item – limited availability. Pre-order recommended.

SEASONAL SPECIALS.name: Pumpkin Pie – Whole ( 12″)
SEASONAL SPECIALS.desc: A smooth and creamy pumpkin pie baked with warm fall spices and a silky custard filling. Available in 9-inch (serves 6–8) and 12-inch (serves 10–14) sizes. Perfect for Thanksgiving tables, holiday dinners, or family gatherings. Seasonal item – limited availability. Pre-order recommended for the 12″ size.

MINI COLLECTIONS.name: Red Velvet Mini Bundt Cake (6)
MINI COLLECTIONS.desc: Individually crafted, ultra-soft red velvet cakes with a delicate powdered sugar finish. Light, rich, and addictive — perfect with coffee or as a shareable dessert.
